name: Piotr Pawlowski
title: DevOps Engineer
facts: DevOps/Cloud Engineer with 10+ years of experience and solid background in Linux/Unix administration
Huge automation enthusiast, automate all the boring stuff around me
Gamer, both video and board games, with a special place in my heart for RTS games
Dog lover; proud owner of Plamka aka Plamchita aka Manchita, adopted from the dog shelter adorable Land Seal type of dog
